description.content: Access league listings, metadata, and configuration for all supported football leagues and competitions.
Returns all leagues the authenticated account has permission to access. Each league includes an ID, name, country, and optional logo URL.

query.description: (Required) Your Statorium API token for authentication.

description.content: Access match data including live scores, results, schedules, lineups, and head-to-head information.
Returns matches filtered by league, season, team, or date. Supports live score updates, scheduled fixtures, and completed results.

query.description: (Required) Your Statorium API token for authentication.

description.content: Retrieve league standings and table data for current and past seasons.
Retrieves league standings table for a specific league and season including team position, points, wins, draws, losses, goals for, goals against, and goal difference.

query.description: (Required) Your Statorium API token for authentication.
(Required) The league ID for which to retrieve standings.
The season ID (defaults to current season).

description.content:
The Statorium Football API delivers comprehensive football/soccer data for over 200 leagues worldwide. The API provides live scores, match results, standings, fixtures, lineups, player and team statistics, head-to-head records, league logos, and translated player and team names. All responses are in JSON format and require an API token for authentication.

Contact Support:
